headline: 3 Consumer Stocks We Find Risky
summary: Most consumer discretionary businesses succeed or fail based on the broader economy. Over the past six months, it seems like demand trends may be working against them as the industry’s returns were flat while the S&P 500 was up 11%.

raw.headline: 3 Consumer Stocks We Find Risky
raw.summary: Most consumer discretionary businesses succeed or fail based on the broader economy. Over the past six months, it seems like demand trends may be working against them as the industry’s returns were flat while the S&P 500 was up 11%.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Tapestry (TPR) After Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Run
summary: If you are wondering whether Tapestry's strong run still leaves value on the table, a good starting point is understanding how its current share price stacks up against different ways of valuing the business. The stock recently closed at US$139.61, with returns of 0.6% over 7 days, 8.2% year to date, 80.8% over 1 year and about 2.5x over 3 years, and around 2.7x over 5 years. These figures naturally raise questions about how much of the story is already reflected in the price. Recent news...

headline: Five Below Q1 Earnings Top Estimates on Strong Traffic and Comps
summary: FIVE posts strong Q1 growth as sales jump 33%, comps surge 22.7% and earnings more than double, prompting a higher 2026 outlook.

headline: CommerceNext Growth Show Unveils Full 2026 Agenda for AI-Focused Retail Conference in New York
summary: NEW YORK, June 04, 2026--CommerceNext today announced the full agenda for the 2026 CommerceNext Growth Show, to be held June 23–24 in New York City.

headline: Macy's Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates on Comps Growth, Raises FY27 View
summary: M beats Q1 earnings estimates as comps rise 3% y/y, best in four years, and it lifts the FY26 outlook for sales, comps and adjusted EPS.
